zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Empson於1514年出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Thomas Empson II24歲，母親Agnes Thomas22歲。他於1539年與Agnes Thomas在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年在他的家鄉享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾維斯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Empson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metronymic meaning ‘son of Emma’, from the Middle English female personal name Em(e), Emme (see Imm ) + -son.
shortened form of Emerson . The two names were no doubt confused, and it is possible that the reverse process sometimes occurred, whereby Em(m)erson was an altered form of Emmeson, i.e. Em(p)son.

variants.name: Imeson
meanings: English: variant either of Emmeson (see Empson ) or of Emerson .

variants.name: Impson
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of   Empson  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US than in Britain.

variants.name: Imm
meanings: German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Im(m)o, a pet form of names based on Irmin-, a divine or ethnic name formed with irmin, ermen ‘whole, entire’.

English (Wiltshire): from the ancient Germanic female personal name Imma, Emma, of the same origin as in 1 above. In Old English Imma, Emma was borne by both males and females. In Middle English, under Norman influence, the personal name Emm(a), Imm(a) came to be used almost exclusively for women, being taken as a short form of Ermingard.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Empson was born in 1514, in St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, Thomas Empson II, was 24 and his mother, Agnes Thomas, was 22. He married Agnes Thomas in 1539, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1544, in his hometown, at the age of 30, and was buried in Westminster, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Empson est né en 1514, à St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Empson II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Thomas, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Thomas en 1539, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1544, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Empson è nato il nel 1514 nel St Margaret, Westminster, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Empson II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Thomas, aveva 22 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Empsonが1514年にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタースト マーガレットで生まれた時，父Thomas Empson IIは24歳，母Agnes Thomasは22歳であった。1539年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでAgnes Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年に故郷で30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウエストミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Empson(이)가 1514년 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Empson II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Thomas(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1539년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Agnes Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Empson родился в 1514 г. в местности ст маргарет, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Empson II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Thomas, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Thomas в 1539 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1544 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
